title: TrustForge Packet
description: Standalone signed/encrypted object that may be delivered offline, relayed, stored, or transferred and verified later. Implements TF-0011 packet mode: packet priority, expiration, route constraints, fragmentation, emergency packets.

packet_version.description: Version of the packet schema itself.

packet_id.description: Stable packet identifier; used for de-duplication, fragmentation reassembly, and audit lookup.

priority.description: Packet priority class. P0 is reserved for emergency / break-glass and is policy-controlled.

emergency.description: When true, the packet is invoking break-glass emergency authority. Must be scoped, logged, and reviewable per TF-0011.

ttl_hops.description: Maximum number of relay hops the packet may traverse.

encoding.description: Wire encoding of the payload bytes.

payload.description: Base64-encoded canonical payload bytes (the body the source signed).

session_ref.description: Optional session identifier this packet relates to.

fragment.description: Set when the packet is itself a fragment of a larger packet.
